Shanif Dhanani.name: Shanif Dhanani
Shanif Dhanani.title: Founder, Nobi
Shanif Dhanani.bio: Shanif Dhanani is a data scientist and engineer building Nobi, an AI assistant that powers search, support, and website conversions. He previously founded Apteo, was lead engineer and data scientist at TapCommerce, and was a product data scientist at Twitter after it acquired TapCommerce.
